news.headline: Security Federal Corp increases dividend to $0.15 per share, a 7.1% increase from before. Paid on Mar 15, 2025.
news.summary: Aiken, South Carolina, February 20, 2025 - Security Federal Corporation, the parent company of Security Federal Bank, has disclosed that a quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share is set to be distributed around March 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of February 28, 2025. This augmented dividend marks a $0.01 or 7.1% rise compared to the prior standard quarterly dividend.

news.headline: UK Defense Chiefs seek 2.5% of GDP for budget before 2030.
AstraZeneca buys FibroGen's Chinese unit for $160M, strengthening financial position and extending cash runway.
news.summary: On Thursday, FibroGen Inc. (NASDAQ:FGEN) saw an increase in stock trading as they announced the sale of their China subsidiary to AstraZeneca Plc (NASDAQ:AZN) for around $160 million. This move was explained by Thane Wettig, CEO of FibroGen, as a way to strengthen the company financially, extending their cash reserves up to 2027. The sale to AstraZeneca, a strategic partner for roxadustat in China, aims to support the progression of their clinical development programs for FG-3246 and FG-3180. FG-3246 is a CD46 targeting antibody-drug conjugate and FG-3180 is their companion PET imaging agent for mCRPC. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Media invited to NASA's Mars habitat simulation at Johnson Space Center on 3/10 to prepare for Red Planet missions.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, NASA announced an invitation for media personnel to tour its simulated Mars habitat on March 10 at the Johnson Space Center in Houston. The purpose of the simulation is to assist in the preparation for upcoming missions to Mars. This event marks the second out of the three planned missions.

news.headline: Tractor Supply stock upgraded on IBD Relative Strength Rating due to rising price performance.
news.summary: Tractor Supply has demonstrated an increase in its price performance, leading to its IBD Relative Strength Rating being upgraded. The stock of Tractor Supply has shown strong potential, prompting positive recognition from investors. This upgrade reflects the growth in Tractor Supply's stock value, highlighting its promising performance. This development showcases the company's resilience and positive trajectory in the market.

news.headline: Analysts predict Booking Holdings to show 13% earnings growth and 8% revenue increase, comparing to Airbnb and Expedia's results.
news.summary: Experts anticipate that Booking Holdings will report a 13% rise in earnings and an 8% increase in revenue. The upcoming earnings report for Booking Holdings raises the question of whether the travel site can keep up with the impressive results seen from competitors like Airbnb and Expedia.

news.headline: Dow Jones down over 600 points; Walmart falls 6% on weak profit outlook in stock market dominated by sellers.
news.summary: Today, sellers dominated the stock market as Walmart experienced a 6% decrease due to a profit outlook that was lower than anticipated. The Dow Jones plummeted by over 600 points, reflecting a significant downturn in the market. Additionally, tech stocks like Samsara triggered a sell rule, indicating bearish signals in the market.

news.headline: CVS Health stock receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improving technical performance. Will the trend continue?
news.summary: CVS Health recently received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating its improving technical performance. This upgrade raises questions about whether the company will sustain this positive trend.

news.headline: Gracie Point secured capital raise for expansion; led by Searchlight Capital Partners, L.P. - Global provider of life insurance-PRNewswire2025
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Gracie Point Holdings, LLC, a prominent provider of life insurance premium finance worldwide, revealed the successful completion of an equity capital raise. This initiative was spearheaded by funds advised by Searchlight Capital Partners, L.P. The investment is expected to significantly boost Gracie Point's financial position and its capacity for growth in the industry. This move reflects a positive outlook for the company and its strategic plans moving forward.

news.headline: Ford Motor Company partners with NASCAR for official car and truck at four premier speedway venues. Includes the races on Feb. 21-23, May 16-18, and May 30-June 1.
news.summary: Ford has recently established collaborations with the Ambetter Health 400 race weekend at Atlanta Motor Speedway on Feb. 21-23 and the NASCAR All-Star Race weekend at North Wilkesboro Speedway on May 16-18. They will also be officially associated with the NASCAR Cup Series race weekend on May 30-June 1.

news.headline: Southern First Bancshares appoints Blair Miller as Chief Retail Experience Officer and EVP.
news.summary: In Greenville, South Carolina, on February 20, 2025, Southern First Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: SFST), parent company of Southern First Bank, has revealed the selection of Blair Miller as the new Chief Retail Experience Officer and Executive Vice President. Miller, known for his strong leadership skills, will take on this role within the organization.

news.headline: NYMEX Natural Gas March futures settle at $4.1520/MMBtu.
NYMEX Diesel March futures settle at $2.5034 a gallon.
NYMEX Gasoline March futures settle at $2.0865 a gallon.
Figure AI enhances humanoid robots with new model post split from OpenAI, allowing them to grasp items, collaborate, and obey voice commands.
news.summary: Following its separation from OpenAI, Figure AI has introduced a cutting-edge new model enabling humanoid robots to efficiently grab objects, collaborate with one another, and accurately respond to verbal instructions. The model has showcased exceptional advancement in robotics technology, with an impressive success rate of handling various tasks and commands. Through this innovation, Figure AI aims to revolutionize the capabilities of humanoid robots in diverse settings.

news.headline: Willis Lease Finance Corp exercises options to purchase 30 CFM LEAP Engines (LEAP-1A & LEAP-1B) for Airbus A320neo and Boeing 737 MAX aircraft.
news.summary: In Coconut Creek, Florida, on February 20, 2025, Willis Lease Finance Corporation, a key player in leasing commercial aircraft engines and global aviation services, revealed the exercise of their purchase rights for 30 new LEAP engines from CFM International, a joint venture between GE Aerospace and Safran Aircraft Engines. These engines, part of a 2019 order option, will consist of LEAP-1A engines for Airbus A320neo family planes and LEAP-1B engines for Boeing 737 MAX aircraft. The specific delivery dates are yet to be determined. By incorporating these engines into their portfolio, WLFC aims to enhance support for operators of these widely-used engine and aircraft models.

news.headline: Fed's Barr: I urge incoming regulators to implement international capital standards.
NYMEX WTI Crude March futures settle at $72.57 a barrel, up 32 cents, 0.44%.
Fed's Barr: It is important to have strong bank regulation and supervision against potential shocks.
Fed's Barr: The Fed should not reform stress tests in a way that results in lower bank capital requirements.
Elon Musk urges NASA to wrap up space station program soon..
Pratt & Whitney of RTX completes first fully digital design review for Next-Gen Adaptive Propulsion. Hardware procurement underway for XA103 prototype.
news.summary: In East Hartford, Connecticut, on February 20, 2025, Pratt & Whitney, a business under RTX (NYSE: RTX), initiated hardware procurement for the XA103 prototype construction and testing. This followed the successful detailed design review of their Next-Generation Adaptive Propulsion (NGAP) solution with the U.S. Air Force. This marks a significant milestone as the company moves forward with this innovative project.

news.headline: Governor of NY, Hochul, to maintain Mayor Adams in office; decision announced by Bloomberg.
Sauer Compressors USA plans expansion with new Utah facility in Cache Valley to enhance operations.
news.summary: In Stevensville, Maryland on February 20, 2025, Sauer Compressors USA Inc., a top supplier of high-pressure compressor solutions, is increasing its operations by setting up a new satellite facility in Cache Valley, Utah. This move is intended to boost the company's presence and improve its accessibility to customers in the region.

news.headline: Fiesta Mart sponsors RODEOHOUSTON for 30th year, highlighting Go Tejano Day celebration in Houston.
news.summary: In Houston, Fiesta Mart is marking its 30th anniversary as a sponsor of the Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo. This milestone signifies three decades of support for the event that showcases agriculture, livestock, and entertainment, drawing in over two million visitors annually. Fiesta Mart's sponsorship has been integral in the success of the rodeo, which has raised millions of dollars for scholarships and educational programs. This long-standing partnership underscores Fiesta Mart's commitment to the community and its support for the agricultural industry.

news.headline: Colorado State University Global launches 6 new online programs in healthcare, legal, supply chain, int'l business, and more.
news.summary: During the Spring Trimester, the University is introducing fresh degree and certificate programs in healthcare, legal, operations and supply chain, international business, organizational development, and information systems. These new offerings showcase the institution's commitment to diverse fields. This initiative is part of a strategic move to expand academic offerings, reflecting the growing demand in various sectors. The programs are set to commence in the upcoming term, offering students the opportunity to enroll and specialize in these areas. The University's proactive approach in aligning its curriculum with industry needs is evident in the introduction of these programs, which are scheduled to begin on [specific date].

news.headline: Vow ASA's Scanship AS secures EUR 3.4 million contract for cruise ship retrofit in Europe.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, it was announced that Scanship AS, a subsidiary of Vow ASA trading on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the symbol VOW, secured a contract worth EUR 3.4 million. The contract involves supplying equipment for a retrofit project on a cruise ship in Europe.

news.headline: Bragg Gaming expands to second Canadian province, Quebec, with Loto-Québec deal. Enters Ontario in March 2022.
news.summary: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (BRAG on NASDAQ and TSX) has signed an online casino content deal with Loto-Québec, the sole legal and locally-based casino site in the province. This agreement signifies Bragg's expansion into its second Canadian province after initiating operations in Ontario in March 2022. Under the deal, Loto-Québec gains exclusive access to Bragg's gaming content.

news.headline: Block Inc is expected to report revenue of $6.29 billion in Q4, with EPS estimated at 87 cents. Analysts bullish on Bitcoin's impact.
news.summary: Block Inc, a financial technology company, is set to release its fourth-quarter financial results after market close. Analysts predict revenue of $6.29 billion, higher than last year's $5.77 billion. The company has missed revenue estimates in the last two quarters but beaten estimates in 80% of the last 10 quarters. Earnings per share are expected to rise to 87 cents from 45 cents last year. Block has exceeded EPS estimates in the last three quarters and eight of the last 10 overall. RBC Capital analyst Daniel Perlin suggests a positive outlook due to the resurgence of Bitcoin, giving Block an Outperform rating and $110 price target ahead of earnings. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Indivior stock falls as drugmaker warns lower revenues in 2025. Q4 sales: $298M, adjusted EPS: 32 cents, operating profit: $66M.
news.summary: Indivior Plc (NASDAQ:INDV) witnessed a sharp decline in its stock value after the company released its fiscal year 2025 guidance, which fell short of the expectations set by analysts. The focused on addiction and mental illnesses reported fourth-quarter sales hitting $298 million, showcasing a 2% increase in comparison to the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $259.3 million. The London-based healthcare company disclosed an adjusted EPS of 32 cents, marking a decrease from 43 cents reported a year ago but exceeding the expected 21 cents. Adjusted operating profit in the fourth quarter remained level at $66 million, while adjusted net income saw a 33% decline year-over-year, reaching $41 million. The firm's outlook for 2024 was slashed due to mounting competition and market pressures negatively impacting SUBLOCADE. For a comprehensive read, please refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ferrari N.V. plans to recommend a dividend of Euro 2.986 per common share, a 22% increase YoY, totaling Euro 534 million.
news.summary: Ferrari N.V. based in Maranello, Italy, disclosed on February 20, 2025, that its Board of Directors plans to propose a dividend payout of Euro 2.986 per common share for shareholders. This marks a substantial 22% surge from the previous year. The proposed dividend equates to a total distribution of around Euro 534 million.

news.headline: South Africa's Buy Now Pay Later market set to reach US$815.1 million in 2025, driven by key players like Payflex and Mobicred.
news.summary: A report titled "South Africa Buy Now Pay Later Business and Investment Opportunities Databook" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides insights into the BNPL market in South Africa, projecting a 13.6% annual growth to reach US$815.1 million in 2025. The BNPL market in South Africa demonstrated strong growth from 2021 to 2024.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETF inflows slow, CME BTC basis suggests potential reversal in price amid low volatility.
news.summary: The decreased inflows into Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) correspond with the recent minimal fluctuation in Bitcoin's value, indicating a potential upcoming price shift.

news.headline: Rock Tech Lithium and Arcore AG merge to create European Lithium Company, joint-venture for German and Bosnian projects.
news.summary: Two companies are coming together to form a European joint-venture that will oversee Rock Tech's Guben Converter in Germany and Arcore's Lopare project in Bosnia-Herzegovina. This partnership will manage the entire Lithium product value chain, from mining to producing battery-grade materials in a fully integrated manner.

news.headline: Mineros S.A. proposes quarterly dividend of $0.025 per share, totaling $29,973,740 for the year.
news.summary: In MEDELLIN, Colombia, Mineros S.A. (TSX:MSA, MINEROS:CB) is excited to share that the board of directors has suggested to shareholders the payment of a quarterly ordinary dividend of $0.025 per common share. This would amount to a total annual distribution of $0.10 per share or $29,973,740 overall for the year. The calculation is based on the shares issued and outstanding as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Alcoa Corp (NYSE: AA) declares $0.10 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 20, 2025 to stockholders of record by March 4, 2025.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Alcoa Corporation (NYSE: AA; ASX: AAI) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for both the Company's common stock and Series A convertible preferred stock. The dividend is scheduled for payment on March 20, 2025, for stockholders noted as of March 4, 2025. Alcoa, a prominent player in bauxite, alumina, and aluminum products, aims to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: Long John Silver's celebrates Lent with Coconut Butterfly Shrimp and OREO Cheesecake, starting Feb. 24.
news.summary: Indulge in Delicious Specials from Feb. 24 in LOUISVILLE, Ky. during the Lent season, with Long John Silver's® offering discounts on flavorful shrimp dishes. Commencing on Feb. 24, enjoy irresistible shrimp specials at Long John Silver's.

news.headline: Motorola Solutions and FairCom host Dev Day in Brazil, strengthen partnership for Flex software suite, emphasizing technical expertise.
news.summary: FairCom and Motorola Solutions broaden their partnership globally with a joint dev team training event for their Brazilian teams aiding Motorola’s Flex public safety software suite. The event indicates FairCom’s dedication to enhancing the technical skills of the Flex development team beyond the U.S. The in-person workshops enabled FairCom’s senior engineers to collaborate closely with Motorola.

news.headline: Consensus Cloud Solutions (NASDAQ: CCSI) to showcase AI-powered healthcare solutions at HIMSS25 in Las Vegas from March 3-6. Booth #1361.
news.summary: A reputable provider of digital cloud fax and interoperability solutions, Consensus Cloud Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCSI) will be present at HIMSS25 in Las Vegas, NV, from March 3-6. Interested individuals can visit booth #1361 to discover how Consensus technology aids healthcare entities in tackling unstructured data obstacles, attaining smooth interoperability, and enhancing operational productivity. During the event, Consensus is scheduled to conduct customer interactions and thought leadership sessions.

news.headline: Vaunt exceeds $1.5M ARR in first year, 100,000 downloads, and 590 flights, boosting memorable travel experiences for users.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR) shared exciting news about their private aviation platform, Vaunt, which has achieved a significant milestone by generating $1.5 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) in its inaugural year. This represents a remarkable 50% growth since mid-2024. Alongside this financial success, Vaunt has also seen over 100,000 app downloads and successfully completed 598 flights in 2024, solidifying its position as a primary catalyst for Volato's expansion. The CEO emphasized that these numbers not only showcase growth but also underline Vaunt's increasing significance.

news.headline: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy calls for crypto cleanup as Jailstool drops value. Portnoy suggests taking out scammers from crypto space amidst Jailstool price drop from 21 cents to 1 cent, wiping out investor funds.
news.summary: Dave Portnoy, the Barstool Sports founder, is advocating for a cleanup of the cryptocurrency sector as the value of his cryptocurrency, Stool Prisondente (CRYPTO: JAILSTOOL), has sharply declined. In a recent statement, Portnoy emphasized the need to eliminate scammers and dishonest actors from the industry, mentioning the importance of maintaining integrity in the crypto space. Following a significant drop in Jailstool's price from 21 cents to 1 cent, causing a loss of millions of dollars for investors, Portnoy expressed frustration towards individuals who ignore the risks associated with Memecoins and subsequently complain about their losses. This development comes amid a broader concern regarding the volatile nature of cryptocurrencies and the vulnerability of retail investors.

news.headline: A report found illegal ingredients for weight loss drugs entering U.S., FDA warned against it.
news.summary: In Washington, a recent report by the Partnership for Safe Medicines has uncovered a concerning trend of unauthorized and illegal ingredients entering the U.S. market for popular diabetes and obesity injectables. These substances are being sourced from overseas, despite U.S. regulations prohibiting their importation. The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has issued alerts cautioning against the use of unauthorized bulk drug ingredients such as semaglutide and tirzepati by drug compounders. This poses a significant risk to consumers as these unsafe ingredients may compromise the efficacy and safety of these medications. The report serves as a warning about the influx of harmful substances into the U.S. pharmaceutical supply chain, highlighting the need for stricter enforcement measures to protect public health.

news.headline: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York releases 2024 financial highlights, covering Q4 and full-year data.
news.summary: Today, the Federal Home Loan Bank of New York, FHLBNY, shared its unaudited financial results for the quarter and year ending on December 31, 2024, in New York City. The released report provides a summary of the bank's financial performance during this period, showcasing key figures.

news.headline: Steve Simpson appointed to lead FanDuel Sports Network South & Southeast regions as Executive VP, overseeing team partnerships, bringing 25+ years of experience to the role.
news.summary: Today, FanDuel Sports Network, a subsidiary of Main Street Sports Group, appointed Steve Simpson as the Executive Vice President handling FanDuel Sports Network South and FanDuel Sports Network Southeast. With over 25 years of experience, Simpson will now oversee team partnerships in these regions. Prior to this role, he was responsible for leading team partnerships in the West/SoCal, Southwest/Oklahoma, and Midwest/Kansas City/Indiana regions. The move aims to strengthen the network's presence in the South and Southeast regions.

news.headline: Bittensor's TAO surges with 20.7% gains in 7 days, reaching $454.58 with a market cap of $3.81 billion. Expert predicts a rise to $640.
news.summary: Bittensor (TAO) has experienced a significant surge in its price, reaching $454.58 with a market cap of $3.81 billion. This surge follows an announcement that Coinbase will soon support Bittensor, leading to heightened activity on social media. Over the past 24 hours, TAO has seen a 9.5% increase, and over the past 7 days, it has surged by 20.7%. Additionally, industry expert Quinten Francois has predicted that TAO could reach $640, emphasizing the strength of this bullish trend. The cryptocurrency NEAR Protocol (NEAR) is currently priced at $3.41, with a market cap of $4.04 billion, experiencing an 8.9% increase in the last 24 hours and a 2.9% increase in the last 7 days. Meanwhile, Internet Computer (ICP) is priced at $7.09, with a market cap of $3.4 billion, showing a 3.4% increase in the last 24 hours and a 0.6% increase in the last 7 days. Expert opinions and market trends indicate a positive outlook for TAO in the near future.

news.headline: Repligen Corp reports Q4 adjusted EPS of 44 cents beating consensus of 41 cents, with sales at $167.55 million. CEO optimistic for 2025 outlook.
news.summary: Repligen Corp (NASDAQ:RGEN) reported a fourth-quarter adjusted EPS of 44 cents, down from 48 cents last year but surpassing the expected 41 cents consensus. The bioprocessing technology company recorded sales of $167.55 million for the quarter, a slight increase from $166.6 million a year prior, in line with the estimated $167.67 million. Olivier Loeillot, President and CEO of Repligen, highlighted the positive momentum in their portfolio during the quarter, with total revenue growing by 13% (excluding COVID-19 impact) despite facing a 2% currency headwind. Additionally, total orders exceeded sales by 6%, driven by the Filtration and Analytics segments. The company remains cautious about the situation in China.

news.headline: NCTC partners with eero for better home connectivity. NCTC represents US independent broadband providers.
news.summary: In Overland Park, Kansas, on February 20, 2025, the National Content & Technology Cooperative (NCTC), which stands for independent broadband and cable providers in the US, revealed a partnership with eero, an Amazon subsidiary renowned for its mesh Wi-Fi technology. This collaboration aims to enhance connectivity services for NCTC's members nationwide.

news.headline: NIRS to hold 16th Annual Retirement Policy Conference in Washington, D.C. on March 3-4, 2025. Strengthening retirement infrastructure discussed.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, the National Institute on Retirement Security (NIRS) is set to host its 16th Annual Retirement Policy Conference titled "Choices, Challenges, and Opportunities | Strengthening Our Retirement Infrastructure" in Washington, D.C. This event will gather leading experts and policymakers to discuss key issues surrounding retirement.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: Consumers and the labor market are healthy.
Fed's Musalem: Gaining confidence that inflation is moving to is target key to support more cuts.
